name: Tostados, Refried Beans, and Creamy Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 whole boneless, skinless chicken breast, pounded flat and thin
1 can black beans, pinto beans, or red beans, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat.
2. Carefully place corn tortilla in hot oil and fry until crisp, flipping once.
3. Remove to a paper towel to drain. Season with salt. Cook remaining tortillas the same way.
4. In a glass dish, combine chicken, garlic, lime juice, chili powder, oregano, and olive oil. Let marinate for 15 minutes.
5. Heat oil in a heavy saucepan over medium heat. Add onions and cook until tender.
6. Stir in beans and water. Bring to a simmer and stir occasionally.
7. Beans are done when they begin to clump together in one mass. Season with salt and pepper.
8. Preheat grill, broiler, or cast iron grill pan. Cook chicken breasts for 4 minutes per side or until cooked through. Slice and keep warm.
9. Mix salsa and sour cream in a bowl and chill.
10. Assemble tostados by evenly layering beans, lettuce, tomatoes, chicken slices, red onion, cheese, and cilantro on top of each crisped tortilla. Serve immediately.
11. Garnish with creamy salsa and cilantro.
